Exhibition Room

July Garden

Mid-summer abundance — martagon lilies, astilbe plumes, delphinium spires, bluebells and foxglove crowding the beds alongside roses and meadowsweet.

No. 9-1
Martagon Lilies
Nona Dronova · 2023 · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · 2022 · Oil on canvas
No. 9-7
Meadowsweet
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
